section_title: Exhibition of false light, mark or buoy
chapter_title: Of Offences Affecting the Public Health, Safety, Convenience, Decency and Morals
text: Whoever exhibits any false light, mark or buoy, intending or knowing it to be likely that such exhibition will mislead any navigator, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.
